description: Listo builds AI visibility and booking infrastructure for hotels and other businesses, including MCP connections that let AI assistants access live business data. Its public site describes services around GEO/SEO, AI-channel distribution, and MCP-based booking integrations.
summary: listoai.co publicly exposes three unauthenticated MCP servers on customer-specific subdomains: Valpas Hotels, Seaclub Alcudia, and Remedy Legal.
